brief_justification: Correct answer with valid Bayesian reasoning; multi-level analysis comparing prior to posterior with causal DAG context; explicit suppress-check for correlation-to-causation and reasoning context injection shows active self-monitoring; comparison table serves as basic verification but no counterfactual or boundary checks; distinguishes observational vs causal inference but doesn't quantify uncertainty; mentions causal effect vs conditional probability distinction as alternative framing; full derivation chain from givens through Bayes' theorem to conclusion is reproducible
